source-discipline.reason: v10.15 entry grounds the rule #10 text patch against DR-2026-05-23. The new text is a faithful generalization of the literal wording ('from the 2026-03-30 round' → 'any positive [OPUS-SYNTHESIS*] tag pre-dating the 2026-05-23 rehab closure'), with the DR cited inline so the rationale is auditable. Cohort scope, banner text, and DB mirror are all consistent with the artifacts touched this session.

bias_direction: v10.15 entry was authored in the same session that applied B.0 closure under the broader cohort definition. The bias risk is that queueing the PI patch in the same session legitimizes a cohort decision that an arms-length review might narrow. Mitigation: the patch is a queue entry only — the live PI in claude.ai is unaffected until owner paste. The DR (DR-2026-05-23) provides the deliberative-record basis; this entry merely points to it.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: An outside reviewer would object that PI text changes should not be queued by the same Claude session that committed a cohort interpretation under that text; this conflates 'I applied X under reading Y' with 'X should be amended to match reading Y.' Counter: the entry is a queue, not a deployment; the owner has the floor on whether to paste v10.15 and can reject the wording change while keeping the B.0 application (since the DB state holds independent of PI wording). The repo-side audit trail is preserved either way.
